## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check . --select E,F,W --ignore E501`)
- [ ] No new hardcoded behavior — new knobs go through the settings
      namespace (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry under **Unreleased**
- [ ] Docstrings for any new public API
